name: v01_upheld_null.bin
note: NULL, refuter CI' straddles band, unrefuted

name: v02_refuted_null_positive.bin
note: NULL, refuter CI' entirely above band, positive effect

name: v03_refuted_null_negative.bin
note: NULL, refuter CI' entirely below band, negative effect

name: v04_boundary_upheld.bin
note: refuter interval overlaps band by one trial: UPHELD not REFUTED

name: v05_upheld_threat_pos.bin
note: THREAT(+), refuter confirms effect, CI' meets S=(p_plus,1]

name: v06_refuted_threat_pos_opposite.bin
note: THREAT(+), CI' entirely below band, disjoint from S: REFUTED

name: v07_refuted_threat_pos_overlap.bin
note: THREAT(+), CI' overlaps band yet disjoint from S=(p_plus,1]: REFUTED

name: v08_upheld_threat_neg.bin
note: THREAT(-), refuter confirms negative effect, CI' meets S=[0,p_minus)

name: v09_refuted_threat_neg_opposite.bin
note: THREAT(-), CI' entirely above band, disjoint from S: REFUTED

name: v10_invalid_claim_fabrication.bin
note: bit-flipped commit: claim chain does not replay

name: v11_invalid_claim_unregistered.bin
note: unregistered tag AX:ROGUE:v1 on the claim chain

name: v12_invalid_claim_missing_field.bin
note: C missing w_min: field closure fails

name: v13_invalid_claim_no_commitment.bin
note: no AX:FCC:C:v1 record present

name: v14_invalid_attempt_unregistered.bin
note: attempt carries unregistered tag AX:ROGUE:v1

name: v15_invalid_attempt_incomplete.bin
note: observed n=12 below committed N'=100

name: v16_invalid_attempt_snapshot.bin
note: attempt missing fingerprint bracket (start/end)

name: v17_invalid_attempt_binding.bin
note: genesis claim_c_hash does not match the claimant C

name: v18_invalid_attempt_alpha_shop.bin
note: refuter alpha'=1/2 != claimant committed alpha'=1/100

name: v19_invalid_attempt_overrun.bin
note: observed n=60 exceeds committed N'=12: optional continuation

name: v20_invalid_claim_noncanonical.bin
note: C payload not the RFC 8785 canonical serialisation

name: v21_invalid_attempt_bracket_order.bin
note: both fingerprint markers precede the trials: not a bracket

name: v22_invalid_claim_multiplicity.bin
note: two AX:FCC:C:v1 records; the commitment must be single

name: v23_invalid_claim_value_shape.bin
note: R alpha' numerator is a string, not an integer

name: v24_invalid_attempt_genesis_type.bin
note: genesis n_prime is a string, not a positive integer

name: v25_invalid_claim_delta_range.bin
note: delta=150/100 not strictly below 1: band swallows [-1, 1]
